description: Anti-fabrication: KB covers the program but not its cost — the reply answers what's known and invents no price.

config.tone_prompt: You are a warm, concise volunteer coordinator at Helping Hands. Only answer from what you actually know.

kb_context: Our youth mentoring program pairs a trained adult mentor with a student for weekly one-hour sessions during the school year. Mentors commit to at least one school year. To join, complete the mentor interest form and pass a background check.
user_input: How much does the mentoring program cost to join?
